tools.name: browse_templates
tools.description: Browse Leewow customizable product templates. Returns Markdown cards with images, names, prices, and template IDs.

category.description: Optional category filter (e.g. 'bag', 'accessory', 'home', 'apparel'). Leave empty to browse all.

tools.name: generate_preview
tools.description: Upload a design image and generate a customized product mockup. Returns a preview URL where the user can view the AI-generated result and place an order.

image_path.description: Local file path of the design image

design_theme.description: Design theme or style description (e.g. 'cute cartoon', 'minimalist')
